allow: Bash(mv "PEGGY AI/My GirlFriend/My GirlFriend.csproj" "PEGGY AI/My GirlFriend/Peggyderud.csproj")
Bash(cmd //c "move ""F:\\Personal\\Source Codes\\My Projects\\PEGGY AI"" ""F:\\Personal\\Source Codes\\My Projects\\Peggyderud""")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem ''F:\\Personal\\Source Codes\\My Projects\\PEGGY AI\\.vs'' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName | Select-Object -First 30")

Bash(powershell -Command "Rename-Item -LiteralPath ''F:\\Personal\\Source Codes\\My Projects\\PEGGY AI'' -NewName ''Peggyderud''; Get-ChildItem ''F:\\Personal\\Source Codes\\My Projects\\Peggyderud'' | Select-Object Name")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem ''F:\\Personal\\Source Codes\\My Projects\\PEGGY AI'' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_Name -match ''lock|\\.ide$|\\.suo$'' } | Select-Object FullName")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem ''F:\\Personal\\Source Codes\\My Projects\\PEGGY AI'' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -File | Where-Object { $_Name -match ''lock|\\.ide$|\\.suo$|\\.pdb$'' } | Select-Object FullName")
